zh.lifeSummary: 當John Langton於大約1387年出生在英國越可爾法爾利時，他的父親John Langton III26歲，母親Joan Neville24歲。他於大約1412年與Euphemia Aske在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1459年2月25日在英國越可爾利德斯享年73歲，埋葬在英國越可爾利德斯 聖 彼得。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Langton于大约1387年出生在英国越可爾法爾利时，他的父亲John Langton III26岁，母亲Joan Neville24岁。他于大约1412年与Euphemia Aske在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1459年2月25日在英国越可爾利德斯享年73岁，埋葬在英国越可爾利德斯 聖 彼得。

nameMeanings.name: Langton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, such as Langton Hall in Kirkby in Ashfield (Nottinghamshire), Langton Lodge in Hendon (Middlesex), Langton (Yorkshire), East and West Langton (Leicestershire), Langton by Horncastle, Langton by Spilsby, and Langton by Wragby (all in Lincolnshire), and Lanton (Northumb). Compare Lankton , Lanton , and Longton .

variants.name: Lankton
meanings: History: Thomas Lankton, born c. 1714 in Hartford County, CT, died 1783 in Litchfield County, CT, was a son of Joseph Langton.

variants.name: Longton
meanings: habitational name from Longton in Lancashire. The placename derives from Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Langton was born about 1387, in Farnley, Yorkshire, England, his father, John Langton III, was 26 and his mother, Joan Neville, was 24. He married Euphemia Aske about 1412, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 25 February 1459, in Leeds, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Leeds St Peter, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Langton est né environ 1387, à Farnley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Langton III, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan Neville, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Euphemia Aske environ 1412, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 25 février 1459, à Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Leeds St Peter, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Langton um 1387 in Farnley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Langton III 26 und seine Mutter Joan Neville 24. Er hat um 1412 in England Euphemia Aske geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Februar 1459 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Leeds, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Leeds St Peter, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Langton è nato il circa 1387 nel Farnley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, John Langton III, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Joan Neville, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Euphemia Aske circa 1412, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 febbraio 1459, nel Leeds, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Leeds St Peter, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Langtonが約1387年にイギリスヨークシュアイアファルンリーで生まれた時，父John Langton IIIは26歳，母Joan Nevilleは24歳であった。約1412年にイギリスでEuphemia Askeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1459年2月25日にイギリスヨークシュアイアリーズで73歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアリーズ スト ペターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Langton(이)가 대략 1387년 영국 요르크실르 패른리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Langton III(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Neville(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1412년 영국에서 Euphemia Aske(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1459년 2월 25일 영국 요르크실르 리드즈에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 리드즈 스트 피터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Langton nasceu aproximadamente 1387, em Farnley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Langton III, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan Neville, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Euphemia Aske aproximadamente 1412, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de fevereiro de 1459, em Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Leeds St Peter, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Langton родился около 1387 г. в местности фарнли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Langton III было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Neville, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Euphemia Aske около 1412 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 25 февраля 1459 г. в местности лидс, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности лидс ст питир, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Langton nació aproximadamente 1387, en Farnley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Langton III, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joan Neville, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Euphemia Aske aproximadamente 1412, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 25 de febrero de 1459, en Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Leeds St Peter, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
